message:
Make Claude Code Review manual-only and improve check name

Change workflow trigger from automatic (on PR open/sync) to manual
(@claude mention in comments). Rename job from 'claude-review' to
'Review' for cleaner GitHub check display.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,17 +1,13 @@
 name: Claude Code Review
 
 on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [opened, synchronize]
-    # Optional: Only run on specific file changes
-    # paths:
-    #   - "src/**/*.ts"
-    #   - "src/**/*.tsx"
-    #   - "src/**/*.js"
-    #   - "src/**/*.jsx"
+  issue_comment:
+    types: [created]
+  pull_request_review_comment:
+    types: [created]
 
 jobs:
-  claude-review:
+  Review:
     # Optional: Filter by PR author
     # if: |
     #   github.event.pull_request.user.login == 'external-contributor' ||
